summary: Frontend testing completed for TRUCKER-NAV-By-TUE gold/black theme fixes. All requested features verified working: Guest login, Navigation view, Route calculation (661+ mi), START NAV button, NavigationHUD with gold/black theme, Speed limit sign in top-left, User location gold arrow with green pulse, POI panel with branded truck stops, Bottom trip bar with distance/time/ETA/state indicator. No error boundary appeared during testing.

issues: Map tile loading shows 400 errors in console (Tangram errors) - appears to be intermittent HERE Maps API issue, map still renders

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: NavigationHUD.tsx uses gold (#D4AF37) for direction arrows (line 23), bg-black/95 background (line 167), gold border (line 168), gold instruction text (line 197)
VERIFIED: NavigationView.tsx line 1442-1443: User marker SVG uses fill='#D4AF37' (gold) with stroke='#000000' (black outline)
VERIFIED: NavigationView.tsx line 1438-1439: Green pulse rings use rgba(34,197,94) which is green color with navPulse animation
VERIFIED: hereMapUtils.ts line 35: ppi=72 for properly-sized map tile icons/text (was ppi=400)
VERIFIED: index.css line 45-49: navPulse keyframe animation defined for pulse effect
VERIFIED: MapUI.tsx SpeedLimitSign component uses gold (#D4AF37) theme with black background

test_credentials.guest: Click 'Continue as Guest' button - no credentials needed

context_for_next_testing_agent: All gold/black theme fixes verified working. Test flow: Guest login -> Skip onboarding tutorial (SKIP button in top-right) -> Click Navigation in sidebar -> Search destination -> Click ROUTE -> Route Comparison Panel shows 3 routes -> Click START NAV -> Navigation active with HUD, speed limit sign, POI panel, trip bar. Known issues: Gemini TTS API 403 error (falls back to native TTS), geolocation denied in preview (uses IP fallback to Council Bluffs, Iowa), intermittent Tangram tile errors (non-blocking).

guest_login.details: Guest login works, navigates to Dashboard, then Navigation view

navigation_view_load.details: Navigation view loads with map, weather widget, search bar

user_location_icon.details: Gold (#D4AF37) arrow with black outline visible on map, green pulse animation rings implemented

speed_limit_sign.details: Speed limit sign visible in top-left corner showing 'SPEED LIMIT 35' during active navigation

navigation_hud.details: NavigationHUD shows with BLACK background (bg-black/95) and GOLD (#D4AF37) direction arrow, gold instruction text

route_calculation.details: Route calculation completes successfully - 661.0 mi shown for Council Bluffs to Dallas route

route_comparison_panel.details: Shows 3 routes: PRIMARY (661.0 mi, 9h 36m), ALT 1 (674.4 mi, 10h 25m), ALT 2 (694.4 mi, 10h 29m)

start_nav_button.details: START NAV button works without crash, navigation starts successfully

bottom_trip_bar.details: Shows current road (W BROADWAY, GO), distance (661.0 mi), time (9h 36m), ETA (6:04 AM), state indicator (IOWA)

poi_panel.details: Shows branded truck stop icons: TA Travel Center, Pilot Flying J, Pilot, Love's Travel Stop with distances

map_tiles.details: Map tiles load and render (some Tangram errors in console but map displays correctly)

error_boundary.details: No 'Something went wrong' error boundary appeared during entire flow

known_issues.gemini_tts_api: 403 error - API key reported as leaked. Falls back to native browser TTS. Pre-existing issue.
known_issues.geolocation: User denied Geolocation in preview environment. Uses IP fallback (Council Bluffs, Iowa). Expected behavior.
known_issues.tangram_tile_errors: Intermittent 400 errors and 'Cannot read properties of undefined (reading retain)' errors from HERE Maps Tangram renderer. Map still displays correctly. Non-blocking.

mocked_apis.none: No mocked APIs - all integrations are live

verified_lines: Line 1438-1439: Green pulse rings with rgba(34,197,94) and navPulse animation
Line 35: ppi=72 for properly-sized map tile icons/text
SpeedLimitSign component uses gold (#D4AF37) theme with black background
